name: Book Return - Release Book Copy
script:
# Update Book Copy Status
if doc.book_copy:
    frappe.db.set_value(
        "Book Copy",
        doc.book_copy,
        "copy_status",
        "Available"
    )

# Update Book Issue Status
if doc.book_issue:
    frappe.db.set_value(
        "Book Issue",
        doc.book_issue,
        "issue_status",
        "Returned"
    )
